output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s How to Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup needed.
content_outline: The Real Reason Landlords Withhold Security Deposits
State-by-State: How Long Is Too Long?
Illegal Deductions: What Your Landlord Can’t Charge You For
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
Get Your Letter in 60 Seconds With Deposits-Back.com
key_points: Landlords must return deposits within a strict state-mandated window (often 14–30 days).
Deductions must be itemized; normal wear and tear is not billable to tenants.
A formal demand letter is often required before filing in small claims court and shows you know your rights.
Deposits-Back.com lets tenants generate a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee—no sign-up, no subscription.
output.cta: Don’t let your landlord keep what’s yours. Create your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-up, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlord is withholding, unfairly deducting, or not returning their security deposit.
